title: davallia imrayana
intro: Davallia imrayana, also known as the Himalayan Davallia or Himalayan Water Fern, is a species of fern native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Davallia imrayana include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory and digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
